summary: Mirrored the TrainStore per-completion reminder cancellation hook into HomeStore and TodayStore. Home task completions and Home protocol-run completions now emit CompletionTimePredictor keys through onItemCompleted; Today focus items marked Done emit source-specific keys for training sessions, home tasks, and home protocol runs. OwloryApp wires all three stores to ReminderScheduler.cancelReminder(forKey:) while preserving the existing bulk reschedule flow.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-reminders-cancel-home-today-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Train completions synchronously cancelled matching reminders; Home task completions, Home protocol-run completions, and Today focus Done transitions relied on the later bulk reschedule cycle.
contract_status_changes.after: Home task completions, Home protocol-run completions, Today source-backed focus Done transitions, and Train completions all route completion predictor keys to ReminderScheduler.cancelReminder(forKey:).
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-reminders-cancel-home-today-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

residual_risks: No known residual risk in the completion-cancellation path. The explicit simulator build still reports the existing TodayView onChange(of:perform:) deprecation warning, which is outside this slice.
recommended_next_reason: Rerun the supervisor after this commit lands to select the next eligible slice.
